channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19384] interop sanity test_60i: FAIL: can't read changelog
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b4f6ff8e-88b9-44a6-b854-ce4acf660a60

test_60i failed with the following error:

== sanity test 60i: llog: new record vs reader race ====== 01:51:34 (1757987494)
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask -n
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+hsm
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+hsm
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl --device lustre-MDT0000 changelog_register -n
Registered 1 changelog users: 'cl1'
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_users
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.changelog_mask=ALL
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=ALL
fail_loc=0x131c
fail_val=1
lfs changelog: cannot access changelog: Invalid request descriptor
 sanity test_60i: @@@@@@ FAIL: can't read changelog

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/107 - 4.18.0-553.53.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4654 - 5.14.0-570.37.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_60i - can't read changelog
item.summary: interop sanity test_60i: FAIL: can't read changelog

status.description: This issue is being actively worked on at the moment by the assignee.

comments.comment:
"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/48902
Subject: LU-16203 llog: skip bad records in llog
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_15
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 8b5e5ccfa8ff52703ed9c860e5b27f07ccdc2fb1

We need to land this patch to b2_15 to fix this issue.

sanity test 160m also failed:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/23bfc949-d533-4563-bf17-76b7845ef32a

lustre-rsync-test test 2a failed with the same issue:

[ 1614.979118] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == lustre-rsync-test test 2a: Replicate files created by dbench. ========================================================== 05:10:14 (1757999414)
[ 1688.426483] LustreError: 178487:0:(llog.c:473:llog_verify_record()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: record is too large: 0 > 8192
[ 1688.428358] LustreError: 178487:0:(llog.c:668:llog_process_thread()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: invalid record in llog [0x8c:0x1:0x0] record for index 0/45: rc = -22
[ 1688.433283] LustreError: 178487:0:(llog.c:483:llog_verify_record()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: magic 0 is bad
[ 1688.709996] LustreError: 178487:0:(llog.c:478:llog_verify_record()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: index is too high: -1573982198
[ 1688.806644] LustreError: 178487:0:(mdc_changelog.c:340:chlg_load()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: fail to process llog: rc = -53
[ 1688.927202] LustreError: 178493:0:(llog.c:473:llog_verify_record()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: record is too large: 0 > 8192
[ 1688.929042] LustreError: 178493:0:(llog.c:473:llog_verify_record()) Skipped 1267 previous similar messages
[ 1688.930500] LustreError: 178493:0:(llog.c:668:llog_process_thread()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: invalid record in llog [0x8c:0x1:0x0] record for index 0/0: rc = -22
[ 1688.932734] LustreError: 178493:0:(llog.c:668:llog_process_thread()) Skipped 1696 previous similar messages
[ 1688.936201] LustreError: 178493:0:(llog.c:483:llog_verify_record()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ff3b173dc46ee000: magic 0 is bad
[ 1688.937812] LustreError: 178493:0:(llog.c:483:llog_verify_record()) Skipped 426 previous similar messages
[ 1689.452890] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  lustre-rsync-test test_2a: @@@@@@ FAIL: Failure in replication\; differences found. 
[ 1689.618592] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lustre-rsync-test test_2a: @@@@@@ FAIL: Failure in replication; differences found.

https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2f6d53f7-4662-4441-8a44-70464abab03e
